parsed.production_notes: The video uses a split-screen format combining a 3D animated AI avatar on the top half and a human-recorded video on the bottom half.

characters.appearance: Young female, fair skin, red hair styled in an updo, large green eyes. 3D animated style.
characters.wardrobe: White top, gold crescent moon earrings.

characters.appearance: Young adult male, light skin, dark hair, short beard.
characters.wardrobe: Dark grey t-shirt, white wireless earbuds.

scenes.setting: Top: Cozy bedroom with fairy lights. Bottom: Room with purple/blue ambient lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is framed in a medium close-up, looking directly forward. She is in a softly lit room with a bed visible in the background. String lights hang on the wall behind her, and a small lamp is illuminated on a bedside table. The lighting is warm and inviting.

Character B is framed in a medium close-up, looking slightly upward. He is positioned against a plain wall. The background is illuminated with a cool, purple-blue ambient light. He occasionally raises a clear plastic water bottle to take a drink.

scenes.visual_description: A split-screen video with an animated female avatar on top and a real human male on the bottom. They are engaged in a conversation. The top panel has a warm, cozy bedroom background, while the bottom panel has a plain wall with cool colored lighting. Text overlays appear in the center, and Spanish flags are strung across the top.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: ¿Hablas español? [Do you speak Spanish?]
Character B says: Sí, conozco español. [Yes, I know Spanish.]
Character A says: Técnicamente correcto. Pero los hablantes nativos simplemente dicen, yo hablo español. [Technically correct. But native speakers simply say, I speak Spanish.]
Character B says: Hablo español. [I speak Spanish.]
Character A says: ¿Cuántos años tienes? [How old are you?]
Character B says: Soy 24. [I am 24.]
Character A says: Quieres decir... Tengo 24 años. [You mean... I have 24 years.]
Character B says: Tengo 24 años. [I am 24 years old.]
Character A says: ¿Cómo te llamas? [What is your name?]
Character B says: Mi nombre es Gustavo. [My name is Gustavo.]
Character A says: Los hablantes nativos normalmente dicen, me llamo Gustavo. [Native speakers normally say, I call myself Gustavo.]
Character B says: Me llamo Gustavo. [My name is Gustavo.]
Character A says: Bien hecho. [Well done.]
Character B says: Gracias. ¿Pero quién eres? [Thank you. But who are you?]
Character A says: Soy un tutor de IA en Praktika. Podemos hablar así todos los días para aprender español. [I am an AI tutor on Praktika. We can talk like this every day to learn Spanish.]
Character B says: Pero mi español es A1. No puedo hablar. [But my Spanish is A1. I can't speak.]
Character A says: No te preocupes. Puedo enseñarte en tu lengua materna mientras aprendes español. [Don't worry. I can teach you in your mother tongue while you learn Spanish.]
Character B says: ¿Conoces mi idioma? [Do you know my language?]
Character A says: Claro, soy una IA. [Of course, I am an AI.]
Character B says: Está bien. Voy a descargar esta aplicación. [Okay. I am going to download this app.]
